---
title: Quick Start
---

### Logging in
You can login on the [GitLab website](https://git.vu.nl/users/sign_in) by using your VUnetID and password.

### Your first project
You can create a project, group or a snippet by clicking on the + sign 

You can find a reproducible layout for research code using Python on [GitLab](https://gitlab.vu.nl/1000SKirsch/amazing_gitlab_research_repo) and on [GitHub](https://github.com/StefKirsch/amazing_github_research_repo).
